retire.en: My grandfather will retire next year.

retreat.en: The army was forced to retreat.

reunion.en: We had a family reunion at New Year.
reunion.zh: 我們在新年時家庭團聚。

revenge.en: He sought revenge for the insult.
revenge.zh: 他為了那個侮辱尋求報復。

revise.en: She revised her essay before handing it in.
revise.zh: 她交作文前先修改了一遍。

revision.en: The plan needs a few revisions.
revision.zh: 這個計畫需要做一些修改。

revolution.zh: 這場革命改變了整個國家。

revolutionary.en: It was a revolutionary new idea.
revolutionary.zh: 那是個革命性的新想法。

reward.en: She gave the dog a reward for being good.
reward.zh: 她因為狗乖巧而給牠獎勵。

rhythm.en: The drummer kept a steady rhythm.
rhythm.zh: 鼓手保持著穩定的節奏。

riddle.en: Can you solve this funny riddle?
riddle.zh: 你能解開這個有趣的謎語嗎？

robber.en: The robber ran away with the money.

romance.en: The movie is a sweet romance.
romance.zh: 這部電影是甜蜜的愛情片。

route.en: We took the fastest route home.
route.zh: 我們走了回家最快的路線。

rural.en: Life is quiet in rural areas.
rural.zh: 鄉村地區的生活很安靜。

rusty.en: The old gate was rusty and creaky.
rusty.zh: 那扇舊門生鏽又會嘎吱作響。

sacrifice.en: Parents make sacrifices for their children.

satellite.en: A satellite sends signals to phones.

satisfaction.en: She felt great satisfaction after finishing.
satisfaction.zh: 完成後她感到很有成就感。

scarcely.en: I had scarcely sat down when the bell rang.
scarcely.zh: 我才剛坐下鈴聲就響了。

scold.en: His mother scolded him for being late.
scold.zh: 他媽媽因為他遲到而責罵他。

scoop.en: She scooped some ice cream into a bowl.
scoop.zh: 她舀了一些冰淇淋到碗裡。

scratch.en: The cat made a scratch on the door.
scratch.zh: 貓在門上抓出了一道痕。

sculpture.en: The sculpture was carved from marble.
sculpture.zh: 這座雕塑是用大理石雕成的。

secure.en: Make sure the windows are secure.

seize.en: He seized the chance to speak.

settler.en: Early settlers built homes near the river.
settler.zh: 早期的移居者在河邊建造家園。

sew.en: She sewed a button onto the coat.
sew.zh: 她在外套上縫了一顆鈕扣。

shade.en: We rested in the shade of a tree.

shady.en: We found a shady spot for our picnic.
shady.zh: 我們找到一個陰涼的地方野餐。

shameful.en: It was shameful to cheat on the test.

shelter.en: We took shelter under a roof during the rain.
shelter.zh: 下雨時我們在屋簷下躲雨。

shift.en: The nurse works the night shift.

sightseeing.en: We went sightseeing in the old city.

significance.en: The event has great historical significance.
significance.zh: 這個事件有重大的歷史意義。

site.en: This is a good site for the new school.
site.zh: 這是建新學校的好地點。

sketch.en: She drew a quick sketch of the cat.
sketch.zh: 她快速畫了一張貓的素描。

skyscraper.zh: 這棟摩天大樓有八十層。

slight.en: There was a slight change in the plan.

socket.en: Plug the lamp into the socket.

software.en: She installed new software on her laptop.
software.zh: 她在筆電上安裝了新軟體。

spade.en: He dug the soil with a spade.

spare.en: Do you have a spare pen?

spark.en: A spark from the fire flew into the air.
spark.zh: 火裡的一點火花飛向空中。

spear.en: The hunter threw a spear at the boar.
spear.zh: 獵人朝野豬丟出一支矛。

species.en: Many species of birds live here.

spiritual.zh: 冥想帶給她心靈的平靜。

splendid.en: We had a splendid view from the hill.
splendid.zh: 我們從山丘上看到絕佳的景色。

split.en: Let's split the bill between us.

sprinkle.en: She sprinkled sugar on the cake.

stab.en: He felt a stab of pain in his side.

statistic.en: The statistics show a rise in reading.
statistic.zh: 統計數據顯示閱讀量增加了。

status.en: Please check the status of your order.

stem.en: The flower has a long green stem.
stem.zh: 這朵花有一根長長的綠莖。

stereo.en: He played music on the stereo.

stingy.en: He is too stingy to buy a gift.
stingy.zh: 他太小氣了，連禮物都不肯買。

stocking.en: She hung a stocking by the fireplace.
stocking.zh: 她在壁爐邊掛了一隻長襪。

stripe.en: The flag has red and white stripes.

strive.en: She strives to do her best every day.

stroke.en: He swam with strong, smooth strokes.
stroke.zh: 他以有力又流暢的划水前進。

submarine.en: The submarine sailed deep under the sea.

sue.en: They threatened to sue the company.
sue.zh: 他們威脅要控告這家公司。

suggestion.en: Thank you for your helpful suggestion.

summarize.en: Please summarize the story in one sentence.
summarize.zh: 請用一句話總結這個故事。

surgery.en: She had surgery on her knee.

surroundings.en: The animals adapt to their surroundings.
surroundings.zh: 這些動物適應牠們的環境。

suspicious.en: The guard noticed a suspicious bag.
suspicious.zh: 警衛注意到一個可疑的袋子。

sway.en: The trees swayed in the strong wind.

sympathetic.en: She was sympathetic to his troubles.
sympathetic.zh: 她對他的困難很有同情心。

sympathy.en: We felt deep sympathy for the victims.
sympathy.zh: 我們對受害者深感同情。

systematic.en: She took a systematic approach to study.
systematic.zh: 她以有系統的方式讀書。

technician.en: A technician fixed the broken machine.
technician.zh: 技師修好了壞掉的機器。

technological.en: We live in a technological age.

telegraph.en: Long ago, people sent news by telegraph.
telegraph.zh: 很久以前，人們用電報傳送消息。

telescope.en: We watched the moon through a telescope.

tendency.en: He has a tendency to arrive late.

tense.en: The room felt tense before the result.
tense.zh: 結果公布前氣氛很緊張。

tension.en: There was tension between the two teams.
tension.zh: 這兩支隊伍之間氣氛緊張。

terror.en: She screamed in terror at the sight.
terror.zh: 看到那一幕她驚恐地尖叫。

theme.en: The theme of the story is friendship.
theme.zh: 這個故事的主題是友誼。

thorough.en: She did a thorough cleaning of the house.
thorough.zh: 她把房子徹底打掃了一遍。

thoughtful.en: It was thoughtful of you to call.

tickle.zh: 羽毛弄得她鼻子癢癢的。

timetable.en: Check the timetable for the train.

timid.en: The timid boy was afraid to speak.
timid.zh: 那個膽小的男孩不敢說話。

tolerable.en: The pain was tolerable after the medicine.

tolerance.en: We should show tolerance toward others.
tolerance.zh: 我們應該對別人展現包容。

tolerant.en: She is tolerant of different opinions.

tolerate.zh: 我無法容忍無禮的行為。

tomb.en: The king was buried in a great tomb.
tomb.zh: 國王被葬在一座宏偉的陵墓裡。

tortoise.en: The tortoise moves slowly but steadily.
tortoise.zh: 陸龜移動得緩慢但穩定。

torture.en: The long wait was real torture.
torture.zh: 漫長的等待簡直是折磨。

tragedy.en: The fire was a terrible tragedy.
tragedy.zh: 那場火災是個可怕的悲劇。

tragic.en: It was a tragic end to the story.
tragic.zh: 那是這個故事悲慘的結局。

transfer.en: He transferred to a new school.

transform.en: The artist transformed the wall into art.
transform.zh: 藝術家把這面牆變成了藝術品。

translate.en: Can you translate this into English?
translate.zh: 你能把這個翻譯成英文嗎？

translation.en: The translation of the book was excellent.

transportation.zh: 這裡的大眾運輸很便宜。

tremendous.zh: 他們付出了巨大的努力。

triumph.en: The win was a great triumph for the team.
triumph.zh: 這場勝利是球隊的一大成就。

tumble.en: The toddler tumbled onto the soft grass.
tumble.zh: 小孩跌倒在柔軟的草地上。

twig.en: The bird built a nest with small twigs.

universal.zh: 音樂是一種共通的語言。

urge.en: I had a strong urge to laugh.
urge.zh: 我有股強烈想笑的衝動。

urgent.en: She made an urgent call for help.

usage.zh: 這本字典解釋了單字的用法。

vacancy.en: The hotel has no vacancy tonight.
vacancy.zh: 這家飯店今晚沒有空房。

vain.en: All his efforts were in vain.
vain.zh: 他所有的努力都白費了。

vast.en: A vast desert lay before us.
vast.zh: 一片廣闊的沙漠在我們面前展開。

vegetarian.en: She is a vegetarian and eats no meat.

vessel.en: A large vessel sailed into the harbor.

violate.en: Drivers who violate the rules are fined.

violation.en: Parking here is a violation of the law.

virtue.zh: 耐心是一項很棒的美德。

virus.en: A virus made him very sick.
virus.zh: 一種病毒讓他病得很重。

visual.en: The movie has amazing visual effects.
visual.zh: 這部電影有驚人的視覺效果。

vital.en: Sleep is vital for good health.

voluntary.zh: 加入這個社團是自願的。

volunteer.en: She works as a volunteer at the hospital.

voyage.en: They began a long sea voyage.
voyage.zh: 他們展開了一趟漫長的海上航程。

waken.en: The bright sun wakened the campers.
waken.zh: 明亮的陽光叫醒了露營的人。

website.en: I found the recipe on a cooking website.
website.zh: 我在一個烹飪網站找到這道食譜。

welfare.en: The school cares about student welfare.

wink.en: He gave me a friendly wink.
wink.zh: 他對我友善地眨了眨眼。

wit.en: She is known for her quick wit.

witch-wizard.en: In the story, a witch cast a spell.
witch-wizard.zh: 在故事裡，女巫施了個咒語。

withdraw.en: She withdrew some money from the bank.

witness.en: A witness saw the whole accident.
witness.zh: 一名目擊者看到了整起意外。

workout.en: She does a morning workout every day.

workplace.zh: 安全在每個工作場所都很重要。

wreck.en: The storm left the boat a total wreck.

yawn.en: She yawned because she was sleepy.

youthful.zh: 她青春的活力讓大家驚訝。
